title: Senior Doctor - BLK-Max Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - BLK-Max Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BLK-Max Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About BLK-Max Hospital:
BLK-Max Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital!
